title: SEC During The Annual Investment Meeting In Dubai
description: L- R: Hon. Commissioner for Finance Enugu State, Mrs. Adaonah Kene-Uyanwune, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission, SEC, Mr. Lamido Yuguda, Managing Director Central Securities Clearing
html: L- R: Hon. Commissioner for Finance Enugu State, Mrs. Adaonah Kene-Uyanwune, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission, SEC, Mr. Lamido Yuguda, Managing Director Central Securities Clearing System, Mr. Haruna Jalo-Waziri, Executive Commissioner Operations SEC, Mr Dayo Obisan and  Director, Office of the Director General SEC, Mr Daiyabu Kurfi during the Annual Investment Meeting in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
